---
name: Feature request
about: Plan a new user-facing or system capability
title: "feat: "
labels: ["feature"]
---

## Background

Why is this feature needed?

## User Story

As a ..., I want ..., so that ...

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Supports ...
- [ ] Handles exceptional case ...
- [ ] Has unit or contract tests
- [ ] Updates API docs when needed
- [ ] Has logs and error codes when needed

## Technical Plan

Modules, APIs, tables, boundaries, and edge cases.

## AI Usage Record

Was AI used? Which steps used AI? What did humans correct?
